seoTitle: Blacksmiths vs Blacktown — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Blacksmiths and Blacktown. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Blacksmiths and Blacktown.
heading: Blacksmiths vs Blacktown — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Blacksmiths, New South Wales and Blacktown, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Blacksmiths has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Blacktown (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Blacksmiths or Blacktown safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Blacksmiths has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Blacktown scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Blacksmiths scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Blacktown scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Blacksmiths or Blacktown?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Blacksmiths has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
